title: Moore & Gillette — The Warrior Within (Cross-Domain Synthesis, 2026-04-26)

concepts.title: Individual Will vs. Collective Pressure: The Tension in Warrior Development
concepts.description: Warrior development requires BOTH separate individual will AND commitment to something beyond ego; cannot choose one side without creating pathology; collapse into individualism → Red Knight eruption; collapse into collectivism → loss of authentic self; maintained tension → Black Knight navigation requiring ongoing discernment

concepts.title: Denial as Pathology vs. Denial as Tactic: The Unconscious-Strategic Boundary
concepts.description: Same mechanism from different sources (pathological: genuine inability to perceive; strategic: deliberate choice to maintain narrative); indistinguishable from outside; diagnostic problem requiring pressure/privacy/consistency tests; gray zone where both operate simultaneously in fragmented psyche; distinguishing requires multiple perspectives

concepts.title: Sacred vs. Secular: The Spiritual-Material Tension in Warrior Development
concepts.description: Warrior operates in BOTH registers simultaneously; sacred register provides meaning beyond material; secular register grounds action in real consequences; cannot choose one without losing something essential; collapse into secularism → spiritual emptiness; collapse into sacredness → practical ineffectuality; maintained tension → both integrity AND responsibility

title: Moore & Gillette — Phase 6 Cross-Domain Enrichment (2026-04-26)

concepts.title: Psychology as Tactical Substrate
concepts.description: Psychological mechanisms (projection, threat-detection, dominance-seeking, dissociation, bonding) can be deployed consciously as tactics when integrated; same mechanism from two sources (unconscious defense vs. conscious deployment); consciousness as ethical boundary: deployed pole is known and chosen vs. possessed pole is automatic; practical section on Warrior/Paranoid/Trickster/Magician/Lover mechanisms and their tactical applications

concepts.title: Consciousness as Operational Advantage
concepts.description: Integrated consciousness under activation produces better decisions, more accurate perception, real-time adjustment, relational coherence in high-stakes contexts; cross-domain convergence of Gigerenzer (immanent reflection as stance), M&G (integrated consciousness as nervous system capacity), Eastern traditions (non-dual awareness); consciousness not luxury but requirement for high-stakes competence; repeated games vs. single transactions

concepts.title: Shadow Deployment vs. Shadow Integration
concepts.description: Zweig's integration-for-wholeness (healing, ownership, reducing fragmentation) and M&G's deployment-for-versatility (conscious pole access, operational flexibility) are sequential not contradictory; Zweig describes prerequisite work, M&G describes what becomes possible after integration; neither framework allows for unconscious possession to operate as virtue; unresolved collision: do healing and operational versatility serve compatible goals or do they diverge?

title: Lowen — Love, Sex, and Your Heart (Cross-Domain Synthesis Phase D, 2026-04-25)

concepts.title: The Somatic-Psychological Circuit
concepts.description: Body and mind as unified nervous system; bidirectional change (psychological↔somatic); incomplete change at any dimension pulls others back; circuit breakdown explains why isolated therapeutic approaches fail; requires simultaneous work in three dimensions (psychological understanding, somatic release, relational safety)

concepts.title: Trauma and the Nervous System's Defensive Wisdom
concepts.description: Psychology explains WHY defenses exist (meaning, original threat); neurobiology explains HOW they persist (amygdala encoding, autonomic patterns, neural organization); understanding sufficient? No—nervous system doesn't update via cortical insight; requires direct somatic/relational experience of safety

concepts.title: Deprivation Across Generations
concepts.description: Psychology explains intergenerational defensive patterns (character structure inheritance); history reveals original deprivation contexts (war, displacement, economic collapse); psychological understanding alone risks person blaming ancestors; historical understanding risks fatalism; both required for compassion AND agency; intergenerational trauma as simultaneous personal and historical phenomenon

concepts.title: The Creative Response to Deprivation
concepts.description: Psychology explains creative blocks as defenses; creative practice requires somatic opening (nerve system integration) that parallels psychological healing; authentic voice blocked by armor; genuine expression requires vulnerability only available through nervous system reorganization; psychological insight into block insufficient

concepts.title: The Contemplative Path to Integration
concepts.description: Psychology explains defensive patterns and deprivation origins; contemplative practice provides direct nervous system reorganization THROUGH NON-CONCEPTUAL MEANS; meditation teaches safety without understanding threat; nervous system learning bypasses cortical processing; integration requires understanding (psychology) + non-conceptual experience (somatic/contemplative), not either alone

title: Natori-Ryū Doctrine — Cross-Domain Synthesis

concepts.title: Light and Perception in Warfare
concepts.description: darkness as perceptual disruptor; light as dominance signal; visual advantage as power advantage; environmental control as psychological control; spans history/psychology/tactics

concepts.title: Warrior Embodied Readiness
concepts.description: chi development as nervous system regulation enabling perception clarity; spiritual practice grounded in physiology; eastern-spirituality framework applied to measurable neurological changes; spans history/psychology/eastern-spirituality

concepts.title: Serene Judgment Under Uncertainty: The Epistemology of Decisive Action
concepts.description: distinguishing shian (contemplation) from funbetsu (judgment); decision-making under time pressure; pattern recognition through training; spans psychology/history/epistemology

concepts.title: Warrior Skepticism Toward Supernatural: Rationality as Spiritual Practice
concepts.description: spiritual maturity produces clear perception; supernatural experiences reframed as nervous system hallucinations; rationalist skepticism as spiritual achievement; spans eastern-spirituality/psychology/epistemology

title: Concept Pages (Genealogy, Morality, Strategy — Stone Age Herbalist / *Skull Cults and Corpse Brides: Essays Vol. II*, 2023)

concepts.title: Individualism — Genealogy Not Modernity
concepts.description: Individualism predates modernity by 4,000 years (Bronze Age warriors, Hittite law codes, medieval Christianity, Anglo-Saxon wergeld systems); modern innovation is *universalizing* individualism, not inventing it; medieval societies held hierarchy and individual rights coherently together; modernity fragmented this into binary (choose egalitarianism or authoritarianism, cannot have both); intellectual capacity *lost*, not gained

concepts.title: Atheism — Two Forms, Opposite Moralities
concepts.description: Atheism not unified ethical position; empirical atheism (Pirahã: pragmatic morality grounded in utility), principled atheism (Critias: power morality where justice is strongest imposing will), humanistic atheism (rational grounding) are opposite moral systems sharing disbelief in God; atheism does not determine moral outcome

concepts.title: Primitivism — Egalitarian vs. Ascending Incompatible Visions
concepts.description: Egalitarian primitivism: humans naturally equal, hierarchy artificial; ascending primitivism: humans naturally hierarchical, egalitarianism imposed by weak; both ground in appeals to nature; both justify opposite social orders; choice between them is ethical, not empirical; nature does not determine answer; appeals to authenticity cannot resolve this

concepts.title: Technology Mediated Warfare — Enabler Not Determiner
concepts.description: Technology enables escalation but culture determines whether escalation occurs; Moriori refused muskets to preserve Nunuku's Law despite technological disadvantage; Japan adopted firearms rapidly; China selectively; Māori incorporated muskets into existing warrior culture; technology is force multiplier of existing strategic logic, not independent driver; cultural choice operates at every stage

title: Concept Pages (Knowledge Architecture and Epistemology — Daniel Pink practitioner-analysis)

concepts.title: Generalist as Epistemic Position
concepts.description: Different disciplines ask identical questions but never talk to each other; generalists see convergence specialists miss (chronobiology + decision-making + sports psychology on timing); translator function = bilingual in academic + accessible language; academy organized by specialization, convergence-spotting requires generalists; gap in institutional knowledge architecture

title: Strategy-Psychology Bridge: Protective Mechanisms as Strategic Systems (10 pages)

concepts.title: Mēsis as Internal Sabotage
concepts.description: The internal saboteur uses cunning (mēsis) against the self, disguising harm as care; protective system as strategic intelligence, not pathology; why mēsis is more effective than open opposition

concepts.title: Center of Gravity and Personal Spirit
concepts.description: Military strategy identifies center of gravity as source of opponent's power; the personal spirit is the psychological center of gravity that both protective system defends and demon-lover seeks to corrupt

concepts.title: Completion as Strategic Resolution
concepts.description: Trauma treatment faces choice between annihilation strategy (complete resolution) and exhaustion strategy (indefinite management); healing is strategic decision, not just therapeutic technique

concepts.title: Friction and Dissociative Delay
concepts.description: Clausewitzian friction (gap between plan and execution) operates psychologically as dissociative interruption; understanding as structural property rather than personal failure

concepts.title: Protective Equilibrium as Mixed Strategy
concepts.description: Protector-Persecutor operates as mixed strategy in game-theoretic equilibrium; Nash equilibrium at system level explains why unilateral change is impossible; third-party guarantees enable disarmament

concepts.title: Schelling's Coercive Bargaining and Nervous System Negotiation
concepts.description: Healing requires establishing credible commitment to safety under conditions of threat; protective system needs costly signals of genuine change over time

concepts.title: Sun Tzu's Indirection vs. Direct Completion
concepts.description: Strategic wisdom counsels avoiding direct confrontation, but trauma integration requires moving directly into what was avoided; paradox reveals limits of external strategy applied to internal integration

concepts.title: Mutual Assured Destruction and Protective Stalemate
concepts.description: Protective system and conscious person hold mutual veto power; neither can safely change unilaterally; disarmament requires external holding guaranteeing both parties' survival

concepts.title: Deception Credibility and Protective System Trust
concepts.description: Protective system's decades of dissociative deception undermine its current credibility; system cannot restore trust through assertion alone, only through costly signals and time

concepts.title: Counterinsurgency and Nervous System Persuasion
concepts.description: Healing is not defeating protective system through force but winning hearts and minds of nervous system through demonstrating safety, external legitimacy, consistency, and actual improvements to wellbeing

title: PRIMARY HUBS: IDENTITY ARCHITECTURE AND TRAUMA INTEGRATION

concepts.title: Identity Architecture and Defense Hub
concepts.description: 15 pages (psychology + cross-domain synthesis); identity as defensive system rather than essence; eight concealment archetypes organized by reference points and shame triggers; integration with behavioral economics (loss aversion, reference dependence, mental accounting, sunk cost) explaining why identity persists despite conscious recognition it doesn't work

concepts.title: Trauma and Somatic Psychology Hub
concepts.description: 8 pages (psychology); Levine/Scaer neurobiological framework; trauma as encoding in threat-response system rather than cognitive narrative; dissociation and freeze as adaptive responses; why talk therapy alone fails; somatic intervention requirement

title: PRIMARY HUBS: PROPAGANDA AND MANIPULATION AT SCALE

concepts.title: Propaganda and Mass Persuasion Hub
concepts.description: 22 pages (rebuilt 2026-04-22); Bernays active manufacture (9 pages, 2 sources) + Chomsky/Herman structural filters (13 pages, 1 source); supply-side manufacture (Bernays) integrated with structural determination (Chomsky/Herman); two sources on Manufacturing Consent: scholarly + 22 cross-domain/history concept pages with case studies

concepts.title: Manipulation and Influence Hub
concepts.description: 48 pages (updated 2026-04-22); complete taxonomy by three-level structure (Tricks & Traps / Complex Manipulation / Human Bias Games) + psychological substrate (cognitive biases, emotional hijacking, perception, self-delusion, memory, interpersonal, information-layer institutional); 12 Manufacturing Consent pages added to institutional/information-layer section (Five Filters + apparatus + PR industry + think tanks + cost asymmetry + bounds)

concepts.title: Mass Movement Psychology Hub
concepts.description: 11 pages (Hoffer *The True Believer*, 1951); individual psychology of mass movement recruitment and fanaticism; demand-side psychology (why people are susceptible to propaganda)

title: SECONDARY HUBS: ECONOMICS AND CONFLICT THEORY

concepts.title: Warfare, Coercion & Conflict Theory Hub
concepts.description: 8 pages (cross-domain synthesis); structural principles of coercion across scales (individual persuasion through nuclear deterrence); archetypes of political violence; game-theoretic bargaining; technology as force multiplier; indirect approach vs. direct completion; mutual threat equilibrium; coercive credibility as persuasion

concepts.title: Economics, Pricing & Behavioral Signaling Hub
concepts.description: 10 pages (cross-domain synthesis); price as pure psychology dressed in numbers; price-quality signaling; anchoring and reference dependence; costly signaling; artificial scarcity and FOMO; temporal reframing of costs; ownership illusion; decision architecture using price

title: SECONDARY HUBS

concepts.title: Polymathic Operating System Hub
concepts.description: 11 pages (D0 framework + D1–D10); two epistemic tiers

concepts.title: Japanese Martial Philosophy Hub
concepts.description: 50 pages (31 cross-domain + 13 eastern-spirituality + 9 history + 1 psychology); Tokitsu + Lovret + Cleary + Ratti/Westbrook clusters

title: ALMOST-READY HUBS (4-5+ pages, clear coherence, ready for MOC build)

concepts.title: Sacred Cosmology & The Supernatural
concepts.description: 7 pages: structural role of supernatural in cosmology, social organization, and meaning-making; soul concept across traditions; intermediary realm/mundus imaginalis; threshold as liminal space; wounded healer archetype; divine encounter in suffering

concepts.title: Language, Semiotics & Branding
concepts.description: 8 pages: language and symbolic systems as technology for shaping thought and perception; proto-writing and knowledge monopoly; skeuomorphism and design; synesthesia and multi-sensory branding; metaphor and rhetorical devices; brand psychology

concepts.title: Meaning, Temporality & Psychology
concepts.description: 8 pages: how consciousness experiences and creates meaning through time; temporal perception and psychology; presence and personhood; kairos vs. kronos; impermanence and freedom; symbolic capacity and healing; two-worlds framework for trauma integration

title: Stone Age Herbalist — Berserkers, Cannibals & Shamans (2022)

concepts.title: Genius as Shamanic Archetype
concepts.description: the creative genius occupies the same structural position in a complex society that the shaman occupies in a tribal one; Eliade's wounded healer cross-cultural skeleton; Herder's transmission layer; Derveni Papyrus as Greek instance; liminal gender/social position; psychopathology as credential not liability

concepts.title: Deep Time Animist Horror
concepts.description: geological scale (Hutton/Playfair 1788 — "no vestige of a beginning"); John McPhee's coinage; Petralona Cave skull (Mesozoic formations, hominid face, possibly independent lineage); Conneller's lignite beetle (objects become other objects); Magdalenian animist frame; the horror is not cosmic indifference but cosmic attention

concepts.title: Archetypes of Political Violence
concepts.description: three archetypes with distinct biological drivers: anarcho-monarchism (loyalty instinct — kill the intermediaries, preserve the king), anarcho-fascism (proving instinct — koryos/Männerbund/Donovan warrior-gang), anarcho-primitivism (alienation instinct — destroy symbolic thought using symbolic thought); Haida as case study; Harii as Germanic anarcho-fascist instance

concepts.title: Knowledge Monopoly and Proto-Writing
concepts.description: proto-writing (encodes concepts) vs. writing (encodes language); writing invented independently only 4 times; seven proto-writing systems analyzed (Kaidā glyphs, Adinkra, Rongorongo, Ersu Shaba, Oracle bone, Pima calendar sticks, Jiahu symbols); Ersu Shaba as extinction case (<10 readers); three monopoly contexts (administrative, magical/divinatory, royal prerogative)

title: Manufacturing Consent — Propaganda Model Concepts (Chomsky & Herman, 1988)

concepts.title: Five-Filter Propaganda Model
concepts.description: Core framework: ownership → advertising → sourcing → flak → ideology; propaganda without conspirators; ethical journalists producing propaganda structurally

concepts.title: Ownership, Size, and Profit Orientation (Filter 1)
concepts.description: 800 firms (1945) → 9 conglomerates (2002); consolidation arc; owner class interests shape editorial bias

concepts.title: Advertising as License to Publish (Filter 2)
concepts.description: 50-80% revenue dependency; advertiser tolerance determines content scope

concepts.title: Sourcing Doctrine and Bureaucratic Affinity (Filter 3)
concepts.description: Official sources cheap/available; independent verification expensive; rational bias toward institutional narratives

concepts.title: Flak Mechanism and Organized Pressure (Filter 4)
concepts.description: Organized pressure raises cost of skepticism; rational self-censorship

concepts.title: Anticommunism as Ideological Filter (Filter 5)
concepts.description: Ideology as permission structure; suspension of evidence standards; morphs to other threats post-Cold War

concepts.title: Pentagon Information Apparatus
concepts.description: 660,000+ annual releases; sourcing asymmetry at scale

concepts.title: Media Concentration Trajectory
concepts.description: Consolidation arc with empirical data; capital logic produces structural bias

concepts.title: Cost-Asymmetry in Propaganda Production
concepts.description: Truth expensive, lies cheap; system selects for false official claims

concepts.title: Bounds of Controversy
concepts.description: Tactical questions askable, strategic questions off-limits; Tet Offensive case

concepts.title: Narrative Premise as Meta-Filter
concepts.description: Unchallenged assumptions determining thinkability; meta-filter operating at frame level

concepts.title: Uncritical Source Acceptance Patterns
concepts.description: Professional hierarchy of evidence produces institutional bias

concepts.title: Corporate PR Industry Scale
concepts.description: Corporate propaganda infrastructure competing with journalism

concepts.title: Think-Tank Flak Producer Network
concepts.description: Organized, funded flak infrastructure; asymmetric funding toward conservative interests

concepts.title: Vietnam War Institutional Narrative
concepts.description: US framing vs. actual history; media role within unchallenged benevolence frame

concepts.title: Tet Offensive Media Coverage
concepts.description: Media accuracy within unchallenged bounds; freedom house study self-refutation; public opinion stability despite coverage

concepts.title: Tonkin Gulf Incident Media Coverage
concepts.description: First attack real, second false; media accepted both; sourcing asymmetry and anticommunism filter operated

concepts.title: Paris Peace Agreements Misinterpretation
concepts.description: Kissinger interpretation contradicted treaty text; media accepted interpretation over document; authority bias case

concepts.title: Guatemala 1984 Election Observation
concepts.description: Elections under military control; bounds determine what's observable; accurate reporting within false frame

concepts.title: KGB-Bulgarian Pope Shooting Plot
concepts.description: Sterling-Henze-Kalb model construction; media accepted conspiracy theory; Agca incoherence/coaching evidence; Rome trial acquittal; Western motive analysis never examined

concepts.title: Sourcing Asymmetry in Wartime
concepts.description: Military information monopoly; journalists structurally prevented from independent verification

title: Evolutionary Biology & Population Mechanisms

concepts.title: The Anna Karenina Principle: Why Only 14 of 148 Large Animals Became Domesticated
concepts.description: Five simultaneous constraints determine domesticability (diet/herbivore with low feed conversion, growth rate/adult in 3-4 years, breeding pattern/mate in captivity, temperament/not unpredictably aggressive, social structure/herd hierarchy); only 14 of 148 large mammals satisfy all five; each species fails differently

concepts.title: Genetic Resistance to Disease: How Epidemics Select for Immune Alleles
concepts.description: Disease as dual mechanism: proximate catastrophe (kills people immediately) and ultimate selection pressure (selects for genetic resistance); sickle cell 25-40% frequency in malaria-endemic Sub-Saharan Africa; CCR5-Δ32 10% in plague-exposed Northern Europe; 10,000+ years of selection pressure created immune system divergence

concepts.title: Epidemic vs. Endemic Disease Framework: How Disease Persistence Changes Selection Pressure
concepts.description: Epidemic diseases (periodic outbreaks) produce brief selection pressure; endemic diseases (continuous presence) produce constant selection pressure; measles requires minimum ~300,000 population to remain endemic; endemic disease creates stronger genetic divergence than episodic epidemics

concepts.title: Megafauna Extinction: Human Overkill vs. Climate Change
concepts.description: Extinction timing correlates with human arrival (Australia 40,000 years ago, Americas 13,000 years ago, New Zealand 1,000 CE) more closely than with climate change; megafauna naivety to human predation enabled rapid extinction; kill sites with butchered megafauna, moas extinct within 400 years of Polynesian arrival

title: Historical Methodology & Philosophical Frameworks

concepts.title: Historical Science Methodology: Applying Evolutionary Biology's Logic to History
concepts.description: Transposing causal method from evolutionary biology into history: natural experiments where variables change, outcomes are observable, causation inferred from covariance across cases; historical science is not narrative explanation but pattern analysis requiring comparative method; testimony and narrative are evidence layers but not the whole of causal argument

concepts.title: The Comparative Method in Historical Science: Identifying Causation Through Pattern
concepts.description: Pattern across cases as evidence for causation: compare multiple societies at branching points where some variables differ, others align; variables that track outcomes across cases are causal; continental case studies as natural experiment; New Guinea/Europe case as controlled comparison of geography with culture held secondary

concepts.title: Anthropological Primitivism: Dismantling a Distorting Category
concepts.description: Primitivism (primitive vs. civilized) is false binary mapping onto geography, not intelligence; technology differences reflect geographic differences (available domesticables, axes, disease), not intelligence differences; New Guineans demonstrate higher average intelligence than Westerners despite lacking writing/metallurgy; collapsing primitivism eliminates colonial justification for conquest

concepts.title: Contingency Within Constraint: Why Geography Isn't Destiny Despite Environmental Determinism
concepts.description: Geography determines possibility-space, not outcome; determinism operates at continental scale, contingency at local scale; Japan could reject firearms despite geographic advantage; geography makes outcomes likely but not certain; proximate choice (contingency) operates within ultimate constraint (geography); both scales true simultaneously

concepts.title: Technology Lock-In and Path Dependence: Why Past Choices Constrain Future Options
concepts.description: Early technology adoption creates increasing returns; QWERTY locked in despite inferior alternatives; path dependence means historical contingency creates persistent outcomes; early domestication of specific animals locks societies into agricultural patterns; alternative technologies, even if superior, cannot displace locked-in systems

concepts.title: Language Family Expansion and Agricultural Dispersal: How Geography and Technology Determine Linguistic Reach
concepts.description: Language families spread with agricultural expansion; Indo-European expansion tracked domestication spread; Bantu expansion tracked millet agriculture across Sub-Saharan Africa; Austronesian expansion tracked rice agriculture across Indian and Pacific Oceans; linguistic patterns map onto domestication geography not conquest; language families as linguistic archaeology

title: Polymathic Operating System (POS) Cluster

concepts.title: Polymathic Operating System
concepts.description: 10-dimension framework for extraordinary performance; two epistemic tiers (D1–6 sourced, D7–10 personal); dimensions multiply not add; single-dimension trap failure modes

concepts.title: Infinite Devotion
concepts.description: D1; identity-level commitment where stopping becomes incoherent; 7 manifestation patterns; identity threshold mechanism; distinct from discipline and passion

concepts.title: Polymathic Breadth
concepts.description: D2; cross-domain knowledge as combinatorial advantage; lens multiplication effect; 45 collision points from 10 domains; productive adjacency concept

concepts.title: Mental Models Library
concepts.description: D3; explanatory models vs. heuristics distinction; Munger latticework; cross-model illumination and model-collision as two compounding mechanisms

concepts.title: Long Game Orientation
concepts.description: D4; time arbitrage as master competitive mechanism; six aspects (extended horizons, delayed gratification, short-term failure tolerance, compound investment, durability, arbitrage)

concepts.title: Deliberate Experimentation
concepts.description: D5; hypothesis-first framing; asymmetric risk structure; small bets, fast feedback; treating personal life as laboratory

concepts.title: Integrative Complexity
concepts.description: D6; most empirically grounded (5 independent studies); Differentiation + Integration as distinct operations; not open-mindedness, not relativism, not raw intelligence

concepts.title: Strategic Thinking (Dimension 7)
concepts.description: D7 [PERSONAL]; force-mapping, second-order thinking, premortem, competitive landscape reading; systemic analysis before action

concepts.title: Narrative Intelligence
concepts.description: D8 [PERSONAL]; three layers: structural (story architecture), emotional (resonance engineering), strategic (frame control); distinct from narrative craft

concepts.title: Archetypal Thinking
concepts.description: D9 [PERSONAL]; character/situational/symbolic archetype recognition; Jung/Campbell; archetypes as narrative-register models parallel to analytical models

concepts.title: Astrological Thinking (Vedic)
concepts.description: D10 [PERSONAL]; Jyotish as self-knowledge and timing tool; natal chart/dasha/transits; decontextualization tension with eastern-spirituality cluster explicitly held

title: Japanese Martial Philosophy (Musashi / Tokitsu Cluster)

concepts.title: Hyoho — Strategy as the Way
concepts.description: military method + life-orienting Way + practice; three levels (ge/chu/jo); universal principle; developmental encryption model; burn instruction significance; distinct from gi-jutsu and from LGO D4

concepts.title: Munen-Muso — Nonthought Action
concepts.description: unified action (not unconscious); will+body simultaneous without lag; terminal product of long deliberate practice; Satori parable; subtractive not additive developmental arc; structural analogue to Integrative Complexity

concepts.title: Sen — Initiative and Attention Gaps
concepts.description: initiative via attention-gap exploitation; three vulnerability moments (Chiba Shusaku); three modes (ken no sen / tai no sen / tai-tai no sen); "strike after having won" maxim

concepts.title: Hyoshi — Cadence and Spatiotemporal Intervals
concepts.description: relational cadence field (exists between persons, not within); four types (hitotsu/ni-no-koshi/okure/ma); ma as dynamic spatiotemporal relational space

concepts.title: Kizeme — Defeating Without Striking
concepts.description: combat at ki level prior to technical exchange; Naito-Takano bout; "sensation of being dominated" phenomenology; ki-ken-tai criterion; "no need to strike" maxim

concepts.title: Ki-Ken-Tai Unity
concepts.description: simultaneous integration of ki (will/energy) + ken (sword movement) + tai (body center) required for a valid strike; distinguishes budo from sport scoring; developmental level marker

concepts.title: Waza — Embodied Technique
concepts.description: person inseparable from technique vs. gi-jutsu (Western technique-as-object); different ontologies produce different predictions about mastery and transfer; flexibility cluster (ju/jiyu/yawaraka)

concepts.title: Mikiri — Incisive Discernment
concepts.description: perceptual precision from 3cm dodging to 60-duel strategic assessment; "to see with cutting minuteness"; rests on hyoshi accuracy; ma as dynamic distance

title: Japanese Martial Philosophy (Lovret Cluster)

concepts.title: In-Yō — Balance and Combat
concepts.description: combat as balance-restoration not destruction; "react with vs. react to" distinction; Japanese linguistic structure as philosophical key; metaphysical bracket of entire Lovret framework; Adachi's combat-state diagnostic added (training=yang/battle=extreme yin; five yang-opponent signatures; moving mind=vulnerable)

concepts.title: Michi / Heihō No Michi — The Way of Strategy
concepts.description: three-layer stack (jutsu/dō/heihō no michi); going through mastery to understanding; aging advantage (art grows with age); "continue past mastery to understanding"

concepts.title: Ki — Life Force Demystified
concepts.description: complexity × organization formula; trainable, depletable, detectable; mushin as ki gateway; social/cosmic dimensions added (collective ki + cosmic connection — three-level architecture); [POPULAR SOURCE — unverified at cosmic level]

concepts.title: Mushin — No-Mind State
concepts.description: alpha-wave mechanism; developmental paradox; mizu-no-kokoro (still water reflects accurately) + tsuki-no-kokoro (moon illuminates without grasping) added as second-source perceptual formulations; Hakuin tension

concepts.title: Ki No Nagashi — Flow State
concepts.description: flowing through vs. bounced by; operational form of mushin; total mind-body coordination signature; four bouncing causes

concepts.title: Kime — Focus and Total Commitment
concepts.description: atari vs. uchi (contact vs. penetrating strike); archery story; spiritual + physical commitment inseparable; training-induced hedging problem

concepts.title: Kokyū Chikara — Internal Power
concepts.description: expansion vs. compression power; inhale-cycle power (kokyū) vs. exhale-cycle power (tai); continuous power with no depletion cycle; kokyū dōsa training exercise

concepts.title: Kiai + Zanshin — Spirit Cluster
concepts.description: kiai as emotional reaction to perfect technique (not primarily a shout); TENSION added: Ratti/Westbrook present kiai as independent art with voice as sole weapon at highest development; [POPULAR SOURCE — acknowledged uncertainty]

concepts.title: Aiki — Spirit Domination
concepts.description: kiai applied outward; Daito-ryu lineage depth added; jutsu-to-do transformation in aikido context; command presence mechanism

concepts.title: Kokoro + Shibumi + Haragei — Warrior Spirit Cluster
concepts.description: fudōshin/fudōtai; "spirit of a stone"; mizu-no-kokoro + tsuki-no-kokoro added as second-source kenjutsu perceptual ideals (still water / calm moon)

concepts.title: Maai — Combative Distance System
concepts.description: three zones (tōma/uchima/chikama) + six sub-strategies (nobashi/tokōshi/shikkōtai/nebari/fukurami/shukotai); distance grammar as pre-technique fight architecture

concepts.title: Sente + Ichi No Hyōshi — Initiative and One-Count Exchange
concepts.description: sente as frame-control quality not just speed; ichi no hyōshi (compress exchange to one decisive beat); shōsotsu no heihō (treat opponent as your own man)

concepts.title: Lovret's Hyōshi — Tactical Rhythm Management
concepts.description: han'on (half-count/between beats); katsuri (speed-change disruption); hitotsu no tachi (Itō Ittōsai — one perfect technique as terminal development)

concepts.title: Metsuke — Ken, Kan, and the Grammar of Perception
concepts.description: gaze placement discipline; ken (surface seeing) vs. kan (perceptual penetration/intent-reading); distributed vs. focused attention; mushin as prerequisite for kan

concepts.title: Aiuchi + Sutemi — Death-Acceptance and Strategic Sacrifice
concepts.description: aiuchi (willingness to be struck eliminates flinch-hedge); sutemi (strategic sacrifice of attachment); tea master story; Hagakure death-acceptance; system's unsystemizable existential foundation

title: Indian Political Philosophy / Arthashastra

concepts.title: Artha and the Four Aims of Life
concepts.description: trivarga (kama/artha/dharma) priority hierarchy with artha supreme in governance contexts; four instruments (sama/dana/bheda/danda); arthashastra as unified wealth-power concept; cross-domain: behavioral mechanics (four-mode influence architecture), eastern-spirituality (Gana-Esha organizational theology), psychology (power-vs-ethics framing)

title: Japanese Martial Philosophy (Cleary Anthology Cluster)

concepts.title: Culture-Warrior Unified Duality
concepts.description: culture and warriorhood as yin-yang of one energy; root virtues vs. branch virtues; TENSION added: Bushido class-ethics critique (loyalty replaces justice as root in practice)

concepts.title: Hara / Ki / Haragei — Architecture of the Centre
concepts.description: three-level hara architecture (individual/social/cosmic); ki as organizational coherence; haragei as direct sensing art; Suzuki Premier failure case; three philosophical traditions converging (Buddhism/Taoism/Confucianism); spinning top metaphor

concepts.title: Bilateral Principle (Wa / Ju / Ai)
concepts.description: counterattack ontologically superior to attack; wa (accord) → ju (suppleness) → ai (harmonized identification); arm-wrestling pull metaphor; "riding the tiger"; two masters at dusk; I Ching + Tao Te Ching origins; judo/aikido as institutional embodiments

concepts.title: Bushido as Class Ethics
concepts.description: buke code claiming universal applicability; absolute loyalty stripped of Confucian reciprocity; kirisutegomen problem; Suzuki dilemma; post-Meiji universalization (Nitobe 1900); Blood Flag at national scale; Hoffer mass movement mechanics

concepts.title: Physical Mind and Basic Mind
concepts.description: physical mind (between skin and flesh, knows technique but collapses under pressure) vs. basic mind (settled below navel, stable in emergencies, technique fully absorbed); Adachi Masahiro's somatic/developmental account distinct from Fujibayashi's ethical/motivational dual-mind

concepts.title: Reality-Action-Groundwork (Adachi's Mastery Sequence)
concepts.description: three-stage mastery: Groundwork (transmit technique) → Action (master underlying principles) → Reality (single-minded imperturbable state); sword-forging analogy; Reality = basic mind; temporary performance dip at the Groundwork-Action transition

concepts.title: Death-Resignation Doctrine
concepts.description: "those whose view is life will die; he who becomes absorbed in inevitable death will survive"; one willing-to-die man = thousand frightened men; Han Fei force-multiplier cascade (1→10→100→1000→ten thousand); hesitation = survival-seeking that introduces delay at every decision

title: Maratha Political Philosophy (Purandare / *Shivaji: India's Great Warrior King*, 2019)

concepts.title: Religious Tolerance as Political Philosophy
concepts.description: April 1679 jaziya letter ("Rabbul Alameen not Rabbul Mussalmin"); Muslim navy commanders (Daulat Khan); mosque grants continued; Quran respect protocol; 700 Pathans recruited over internal opposition; coexists simultaneously with Hindu identity project; perennialist political argument

concepts.title: Psychological Resilience and Survival Under Humiliation
concepts.description: three paradigm cases: Shivaji's Agra episode (four-component psychological structure); Rasputin's survival under physical assault + mortality foreknowledge; Kou-chien's 20-year servitude-to-offense program (most extreme duration case); compartmentalization / long-horizon orientation / emotional regulation / identity stability; tension with shame-as-survival-system

title: Late Imperial Russia / Romanov Collapse — Cross-Domain (Moynahan 1997 + Radzinsky 2000/2001)

concepts.title: Proxy Target — Lightning Rod Dynamics
concepts.description: Rasputin as maximum-load case: diffusion, displacement, exhaustion; fatal miscalculation (removal redistributes charge); four enabling conditions; perelom as terminal event

concepts.title: Historiography as Ideology
concepts.description: **(NEW 2026-04-24)** two ideologically opposed myth factories producing compatible fabrications; Schyogolev/Tolstoy 1927 Soviet forgeries; primary-source vacuum as enabling condition; five-stage fabrication mechanism; authority laundering through citation; suppression-by-irrelevance variant

concepts.title: Suppressed Testimony Epistemology
concepts.description: **(NEW 2026-04-24)** three suppression mechanisms (design, irrelevance, access restriction); inconclusive finding as maximally informative; filter mechanism as data; constable murder-night testimony as type case; why surfaced suppressed testimony rarely corrects dominant narrative

concepts.title: Mirror Dynamic — Charismatic Authority
concepts.description: **(NEW 2026-04-24)** Gilliard observation as anchor case; five-component mirror anatomy; wish-detection deployed as confirmation not persuasion; authority stock transforms reflection into revelation; political consequences of mirror in governance; mirror vs. genuine insight in real time

concepts.title: Devotee Creation Mechanism
concepts.description: **(NEW 2026-04-24)** seven-stage devotee creation sequence; immunity architecture (Stage 7) as self-sealing structure; Golovina and Alexandra as documented cases; immunity is rational calculation not failure of reasoning; institutional defense is adversarial process not better information

title: Combat Theology (Rolinson / *ShivaJi, Jai Singh, and Combat Theology In Praxis*, 2023)

concepts.title: Combat Theology — The Parallel Battlespace
concepts.description: theological operations as genuine parallel battlespace running concurrent with sidereal military campaign; four-layer structure (bilateral petition → multilateral contest → co-option of opponent's deity-forms → direct divine command); resource investment parity (2 crore rupees / 400 Brahmins / 3 months = strategic allocation); resonancy principle (deity-form operative through structural correspondence without direct invocation); active integration thesis (perception + correct identification + resources to act); Devi's direct speech as operational command (27-generation covenant); non-believer epistemology (myth's operative logic bypasses personal belief)

title: Combat Theology Synthesis (Rolinson / *ShivaJi, Jai Singh, and Combat Theology In Praxis*, 2023)

concepts.title: Theology as Military Doctrine
concepts.description: theology not separate from strategy; goddess invocation IS the strategic doctrine; shapes perception, decision architecture, timeline assumptions, organization, objectives; Kali doctrine (bold, concentrated, rapid) vs. Bagalamukhi doctrine (patient, distributed, coalition) produce fundamentally different strategic approaches

concepts.title: Goddess as Strategic Intelligence
concepts.description: enemy's goddess choice reveals entire strategic framework; counter-intelligence: recognize goddess, infer doctrine, prepare counter-doctrine; Jai Singh's recognition of ShivaJi's Kali invocation → invokes Bagalamukhi to counter; intelligence hierarchy: tactical/operational/strategic/psychological/vulnerability

concepts.title: Regional Goddess as Political Identity
concepts.description: Bhavani as specifically Marathi, not universal; regional specificity = power (goddess knows terrain, lineage, ancestors); political identity inseparable from spiritual practice; nationalism as theology; challenge: can regional goddess support inclusive modern state?

concepts.title: Sacred Infiltration
concepts.description: infiltration becomes ritual operation under goddess authorization; differs from dishonorable ambush through sacred reversal; requires: authorization, reversal, completion; psychological/somatic consequences differ: authorized operation vs. shameful deception

concepts.title: Typological Consciousness
concepts.description: recognizing mythological patterns in current events as operative principles; pattern recognition across time (Ashvatthama pattern recurs when conditions match); transferable patterns express cosmic principles; distinction: pattern recognition (revelation) vs. pattern creation (interpretation); training typological consciousness (deep literacy, pattern observation, principle recognition, embodied practice)

title: Sam Keen — Faces of the Enemy (DEEP INGEST COMPLETE 2026-04-26)

concepts.title: Consensual Paranoia: Paranoia as Nation-State Operating Principle
concepts.description: paranoia is pathology at individual level but normal operating principle at nation-state level; nations require paranoia for legitimacy, budget justification, domestic cohesion; anxiety root: nations organize free-floating dread into structured threat (enemy); every nation has enemies; paranoia is structural not situational; exchange mechanism: give nation your anxiety, receive specific threat to fear

concepts.title: Functional Atheism: The State as Narcissistic God
concepts.description: individual narcissism parallels state nationalism—both operate as if self/nation is god; removes external accountability; produces paranoia (narcissist experiences all as threats to grandiosity), inability to acknowledge complicity, permanent grievance, escalation as natural response; nation claims allegiance to values while organized entirely around self-interest

concepts.title: Technology and Moral Distance: How Physical Distance Enables Abstraction and Atrocity
concepts.description: distance progression (bow→rifle→artillery→drone→bomber) increases abstraction; increasing distance enables target abstraction; technology enables but doesn't require—institution chooses whether to abstract; dissociation through distance enables psychological override of empathy; distance as ultimate warfare technology providing moral advantage

concepts.title: Curriculum for Homo Amicus: Fifteen-Domain Reconstruction Architecture
concepts.description: reconstructing friendly human requires 15-domain systematic education redesign: history of war/peace, paranoia/propaganda literacy, metanoia/communication, authority/conscience, power dynamics, violence roots, myths/rituals, social change, conflict resolution, loving combat, empathy/compassion, Dionysian festivals, leadership without domination, economics of peace; sequenced foundation/intermediate/advanced/integrative layers; individual moral improvement necessary but insufficient—requires institutional redesign

concepts.title: Loving Combat / Agonistic Engagement: Fierce Opposition Without Dehumanization
concepts.description: dissolves false binary (opposition=enmity OR capitulation); third possibility: fierce opposition while maintaining opponent's humanity; requires: genuine disagreement without contempt, curiosity about position, intellectual humility, strength without domination, acceptance of loss, shared context/rules, continuation of relationship; difficult because institutions teach opposition=threat

concepts.title: Real Enemies and Tragic Realism: Opposition Without Enmity, Realism Without Paranoia
concepts.description: some enemies are real (genuinely irreconcilable interests); goal is not elimination of all enmity (naive universalism) but radical reduction of enmity while accepting opposition; difference between enmity (paranoia + dehumanization) and opposition (competition without hatred); opposition without enmity viable when both parties have capacity to refuse enmity; limit case: tragic realism becomes insufficient when opponent has committed entirely to dehumanization

title: Indo-European Comparative Framework

concepts.title: Manyu and Furor — The Ghost Division's Inner State
concepts.description: Manyu (Sanskrit) and Odr (Old Norse) as the same PIE inner state; Dvandva (no genuine duality — two faces of one force); teleological ecstasy (hammer-as-hammer) vs. Ergreifen (seizure from without); Furor Poeticus = Furor Teutonicus; Word as weapon (Brihaspati's meteorite verse; RV.8.89); Bhasa/Arka luminosity; Vata (vital breath = attacking); "To Be Alive = To Be Angry"; Shiva/Odin/Dionysus as three-tradition patron

title: Intelligence Epistemology — Chinese Military Tradition (Sawyer, *The Tao of Spycraft*, 1998)

concepts.title: Confirmation Bias as Ancient Problem
concepts.description: Lü-shih Ch'un-ch'iu sickle-thief paradigm (ca. 239 BCE) as oldest documented case; Hsün-tzu's 46 obfuscating factors (desire/aversion/beginning/end/near/far/breadth/narrowness); intelligence context: premise-governance corrupts observation; Cross-Domain Handshakes to psychology (bodily-repression-mechanism) and history (estrangement-techniques)

concepts.title: The Semblances Problem
concepts.description: Chieh Hsüan's *mu* (focus) vs. obfuscation (noise) framework; Han Fei-tzu's social proof as epistemological failure (lie told by 1000 becomes irrefutable); chih jen response (multi-domain testing); Contrary Employment as weaponization of the semblances problem against an observer's own grammar

concepts.title: Physiognomy and Character Reading
concepts.description: five-phase somatotypes (Wood/Earth/Fire/Metal/Water) with behavioral predictions including manner of death; yin-yang somatotypes from Ling-shu (T'ai-yin greedy-but-appearing-humble, etc.); Hsün-tzu skeptical argument vs. Wang Ch'ung's constitutional-tendencies defense; King Wen's Six Indications as multi-modal bridge; cross-domain parallels to bioenergetic character armor and Ayurvedic dosha system

title: Methodology and Epistemology

concepts.title: Perennial Philosophy Methodology
concepts.description: convergence-as-evidence argument (independent traditions = independent observation of something real); language-as-cage problem; constructivist critique (Katz: all mystical experience constituted by cultural context); working vault epistemological position: convergence is strong hypothesis, not proof

concepts.title: Ancient Convergence: Five Truths
concepts.description: Hughes's synthesis of five structural claims across traditions: non-separation, fear-as-illusion, mind-as-projector, ego-as-only-enemy, everything-connected; six-stage awakening road map; civilization-as-forgetting thesis; before-death liberation as vault's most robustly documented cross-tradition convergence (five independent traditions)

concepts.title: Spiritual Bypassing
concepts.description: John Welwood (1984): using spiritual practice to sidestep rather than engage unresolved psychological material; distinct from spiritual masochism; Rumi's Guest House as clearest operational diagnostic; ego co-opting genuine practice mechanisms

title: Temporal and Historical Perspective

concepts.title: Kronos and Kairos
concepts.description: two Greek time concepts: Kronos (measurable, sequential, clock-time) vs. Kairos (deep, cyclical, story-time); storytellers should orient toward Kairos; cyclical time as challenge to linear progress narratives

concepts.title: Impermanence and Temporal Perspective
concepts.description: Marcus Aurelius "view from above"; temporal and nature-as-change moves; promontory image; cross-domain convergence with Eastern *anicca* and modern CBT/ACT

concepts.title: Founding Myth Construction
concepts.description: Four moves: reframe failure as commitment, create sacred objects (Blood Flag), convert dead into martyrs, position failure as necessary precondition; cross-domain: guru hagiography, monumental history (Nietzsche), character origin wound, Igbo honored dead; Hoffer: doctrine must be unfalsifiable not merely vague (Tension 3 added)

concepts.title: Generational Myopia
concepts.description: formative window (17-25) generates unconscious assumption set treated as universal truth; three failure modes: downward projection, backward idealization, inward blindness

title: Behavioral Mechanics (cross-referenced)

concepts.title: Behavioral Mechanics: Pillars of Human Influence
concepts.description: extreme high-density synthesis of the FATE model, Six-Axis matrix, and the PCP model; behavioral mechanics as the "Physics Engine" of social reality

concepts.title: AVERY & Extreme Tradecraft
concepts.description: the AVERY internal AI installation protocol; covert brainwave entrainment via isochronic vocal carrier frequencies; conversational sleep deprivation hacks

title: Technology Cascades and System Coupling (Stone Age Herbalist — Demon Bats & Cocaine Mummies Vol. III, 2026-04-24)

concepts.title: Diclofenac Cascade: When a Painkiller Triggers Religious Extinction
concepts.description: single drug (diclofenac for cattle pain relief) → vulture poisoning → vulture extinction → sky burial impossible → Parsi religious practice collapse → demographic collapse through fertility decline; 95-99% vulture population collapse 1990-2005; multi-system coupling demonstration; technological intervention triggering cascade across completely separate domains (medicine → ecology → religion → demography); hidden system interdependence

title: Supernatural Authority and Social Technology (Stone Age Herbalist — Demon Bats & Cocaine Mummies Vol. III, 2026-04-24)

concepts.title: Supernatural as Social Technology: Control Through Belief
concepts.description: supernatural authority (zero visible enforcement apparatus) vs. material enforcement (visible apparatus, rational deterrence); Oba declaration revocation of juju oaths producing ~72% to 2% reduction in trafficking; belief-based internalized enforcement vs. physical coercion; four structural features: internalization, invisibility, universality, transferability; genuine cross-domain: requires african-spirituality (juju oaths), psychology (nocebo/placebo neurobiology), and sociology/governance (authority mechanisms) simultaneously

concepts.title: Darwin's Life as Case Study
concepts.description: biography as recursive illustration of psychological mechanisms

concepts.title: Utilitarian Ethics & Moral Foundations
concepts.description: bridging evolutionary explanation and ethical philosophy

concepts.title: Free Will & Moral Responsibility
concepts.description: agency within determined systems

concepts.title: Chimpanzee Politics & Human Status
concepts.description: primate dominance elaborated through language and institutions

concepts.title: Gene-Level Selection vs. Group Selection
concepts.description: Williams paradigm on unit of selection

title: Evolutionary Psychology & Cross-Domain Integration (Wright, 2026-04-24)

concepts.title: Gene-Level vs. Group Selection
concepts.description: does selection operate on genes (Dawkins) or groups (Wilson)? Genes-eye view explains nepotism asymmetries and apparent altruism; group selection creates different predictions; ongoing tension unresolved

concepts.title: Utilitarian Ethics and Moral Foundations
concepts.description: how evolved moral sentiments ground utilitarian ethics without requiring transcendence; sentience as basis for moral worth; happiness/suffering as natural moral facts grounded in human nature

concepts.title: The Naturalistic Fallacy
concepts.description: explaining a behavior's origin doesn't justify it; evolved jealousy ≠ morally legitimate jealousy; distinction between explanation and prescription critical for evolutionary ethics

concepts.title: Free Will and Moral Responsibility
concepts.description: if behavior is determined by evolution and neurobiology, do we have free will? Compatibilism: free will as absence of external coercion, not metaphysical indeterminacy; understanding mechanism doesn't eliminate responsibility

concepts.title: Chimpanzee Politics and Human Status Competition
concepts.description: human status hierarchies as primate continuity not human exception; machiavellianism, coalition-building, status anxiety visible in chimps; genetic continuity with behavioral parallels

concepts.title: Evolution and Spirituality Synthesis
concepts.description: transcendence within natural constraints; spiritual practice as skill working with evolved human nature rather than denying it; evolutionary psychology and meditation converge on same insight: understanding mechanisms enables freedom from identification with them

concepts.title: Darwin's Life as Recursive Case Study
concepts.description: Darwin embodying his own theory: status anxiety, sexual selection effects, self-deception about finches, health anxiety tracking reproductive concern; biography as illustration of evolutionary psychology in action

title: Manufacturing Consent Cluster — Previously Uncatalogued

concepts.title: Elite Opinion Following — Media as Transmitter, Not Shaper
concepts.description: Tet Offensive proof that media follows elite consensus not vice versa; media as institutional consensus channel with 6-8 week lag behind elite formation; public opinion responds to elite shifts transmitted by media, not to media reporting of events; accountability vacuum when elites privately believe something unprovable in public; cross-domain: structural media analysis (Five Filters) + political sociology (elite formation) + public opinion (demand-side) requires all three domains

concepts.title: Ownership, Size, and Profit Orientation — The First Filter
concepts.description: historical sweep from 50 firms (1983) to 9 conglomerates (2002); owner class interests shape editorial bias without explicit instruction; defense-contractor-owned media structurally prevented from sustained military-spending criticism; Filter 1 activates all four subsequent filters; self-censorship emerges from internal calculation not external force

concepts.title: Worthy vs. Unworthy Victims — Differential Media Coverage Based on Geopolitical Utility
concepts.description: 137x coverage differential: one Polish priest (communist regime) vs. 100 Latin American religious victims (US-backed regimes); empirical data: 78 articles/1,183 column inches vs. 8 articles/117.5 column inches; geopolitical utility determines coverage, not victim severity; no conspiracy required — institutional cost structure automatically produces the differential

title: Conquest and Colonial Analysis — Previously Uncatalogued

concepts.title: Agency vs. Structure: How Individual Choices Navigate Institutional Inevitability
concepts.description: agency and structure not opposites; structure sets possible options, agency selects which to pursue; conquest case: Spanish military advantage made certain outcomes more likely but not inevitable; Marina, Moctezuma, Tlaxcaltec made consequential choices within structural constraints; cross-domain requires history (conquest context), psychology (decision-making under constraint), and behavioral economics (reference points and rational choice) simultaneously

title: Concept Pages (Strategic Leadership Architecture Phase 3 — Bose, 2026-04-25)

concepts.title: Succession as Individuation Failure
concepts.description: visionary systems require founder's psychological resolution (individuation); succession requires successor's resolution, which cannot be inherited or taught; structural impossibility of succession in systems built on genius; Jung + Winnicott psychology + behavioral-mechanics (visionary vs. institutional systems) + history (Diadochis Wars as inevitable fragmentation)

concepts.title: Integration Through Hybridization as Identity Death
concepts.description: true integration preserves both identities while creating new whole; false integration (assimilation) requires one identity to surrender; line between them determined by identity psychology + power dynamics + cultural frame control; Hellenization as integration for Greeks but assimilation for Persians

concepts.title: Sacred Body in Governance
concepts.description: embodied authority as most immediate and most temporally fragile; physical presence communicates before words (psychology: somatic communication); aging unavoidable (history: every charismatic leader faces decline); symbol maintenance increases over time as capacity decreases (behavioral-mechanics: signal decay)

concepts.title: Decentralization as Diffusion of Authority
concepts.description: decentralization distributes decision-making power and creates speed; it also diffuses psychological center that holds system together; invisible center becomes vulnerable to collapse; federal systems need very strong centers precisely because center is invisible (psychology: Aware Ego coordination + fragmentation; behavioral-mechanics: centralized strategy + decentralized tactics; history: federal systems + institutional authority)
